location: Sold by the Nomadic Merchant stationed near the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge Site of Grace in Altus Plateau, for 2,500 Runes.
tactics: This merchant sits right off the road near the grace — easy to reach right after crossing into Altus Plateau from the Grand Lift of Dectus or the Wyndham Ruins route.
The same merchant stocks other heater/kite shields, so check the full list before buying to avoid missing a better option in one trip.
lore: A medium metal shield, easier to handle than a kite shield, bearing a crest of red wings — its fire resistance the highest among heater shields.

builds.name: Fire-resistant Strength tank
builds.why: Highest fire negation (50) among the heater shields, useful vs. Altus/Gelmir's fire-heavy enemies and bosses.
